caption: A man sits in a room that appears to be a studio or office, with walls adorned with framed photographs and clothing on racks, including items with "LEE" branding. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie, tan suspenders, glasses, a large grey wig styled upward, and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. To his left, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and to his right, a similar graphic reads "BOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same seated position, shifting slightly and speaking. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, and his gaze moves slightly while he maintains a focused expression. The background and equipment remain static as he communicates into the microphone.
